typeProperties.command: .delete table FinalizedMessageSnapshot records <| FinalizedMessageSnapshot | where window_start >= startofday(ago(1d)) and window_start < startofday(now())

source.requestBody: {"query": "let start = startofday(ago(1d)); let end = startofday(now()); AppTraces | where TimeGenerated >= start and TimeGenerated < end | where Message has '[EMD][PAYMENT][GET-RETRIEVAL]' | where Message has 'Got retrieval for tpp' | extend tpp_id = extract('tpp:([^ ,]+)', 1, Message), origin_id = extract('originId:([^ ,]+)', 1, Message) | summarize first_time = min(TimeGenerated) by origin_id, tpp_id | project window_start = tostring(bin(first_time, 1h)), tpp_id, origin_id | order by window_start asc"}

typeProperties.command: .delete table FinalizedMessageSnapshot records <| FinalizedMessageSnapshot | join kind=inner (FinalizedMessageSnapshot | summarize max_window = max(window_start) by origin_id, tpp_id) on origin_id, tpp_id | where window_start < max_window
